_meta.purpose: Emotional sentences that add warmth and human feeling. Used selectively — not every review needs one. Engine skips this sometimes intentionally.
rules: Reference family, health journey, relief — real emotions
Short and punchy works better than long emotional speeches
5-star gets more emotional options, 3-star gets almost none

Honestly feeling so relieved after months of struggling.

Health has improved a lot and I feel much better overall.
It's been a long journey but finally seeing results.
Feeling hopeful about my health for the first time in a while.

Feel like myself again after a long time.

The relief is real and I'm not exaggerating.
